title: Between These Two
description:
After a series of cataclysmic events, people begin to disappear and you are not an exception. Your morning starts as usual, you wake up and get ready for the day, but all of a sudden a deafening noise comes from outside. You go to investigate, only to come face to face with a peculiar object. As you touch it, a voice echoes from the sky. Out of nowhere a crystal looking creature emerges. You try to run, but your body won't listen, an unimaginable sense of fear makes its presence felt as you are hurled by a wind so strong that it peels off small pieces of your skin. You find yourself lost in an unknown plane of existence where the perception of reality is distorted.

 

Will you be able to escape?

 
Explore places beyond imagination 
Stay sharp
 Solve puzzles
Fight your way out 

Game Features:-Linear gameplay: Atmospheric, story-driven experience. 
-Puzzles and Riddles: Solve puzzles that will guide you to the way out. 
-Exploration: Enter the unknown and discover its hidden secrets. 
-Minimal Combat: Start defenseless, but there are tools that will aid you. 
-Multiple endings: Choose one of the two endings and find out how this story ends.
description_short: Between These Two is an atmospheric first-person horror adventure where dark fantasy blends with psychological horror. Explore twisted worlds, solve mysterious puzzles, awaken hidden powers, and uncover the path back to reality.
